zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Southworth於1454年出生在英國藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利時，她的父親Sir Richard de Sotheworth Lord Samlesbury44歲，母親Elizabeth Molyneux30歲。她和Sir William Houghton至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1540年在英國藍卡爾普雷斯頓享年86歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Southworth于1454年出生在英国藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利时，她的父亲Sir Richard de Sotheworth Lord Samlesbury44岁，母亲Elizabeth Molyneux30岁。她和Sir William Houghton至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1540年在英国藍卡爾普雷斯頓享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: Southworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Southworth in Winwick (Lancashire), from Old English sūth ‘south, southern’ + worth ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Suthard
meanings: English: variant of   Southworth  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Southwood
meanings: habitational name from one or more of several places in southern England, especially in Devon, named with Middle English bi southe wode ‘(place) to the south of the wood’.

habitational name from one or more minor places called Southwood or Sowood, from Middle English south(e) + wode ‘south wood’. Sowood in Osset (Yorkshire) is the most likely source of the Yorkshire name. There may have been confusion with Southworth .

variants.name: Sudduth
meanings: English: variant of   Southworth  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Southworth was born in 1454, in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, her father, Sir Richard de Sotheworth Lord Samlesbury, was 44 and her mother, Elizabeth Molyneux, was 30. She had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Sir William Houghton. She died in 1540, in Preston, Lancashire, England, at the age of 86.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Southworth è nata il nel 1454 nel Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Sir Richard de Sotheworth Lord Samlesbury, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Molyneux, aveva 30 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Sir William Houghton. Morì nel 1540, nel Preston, Lancashire, England, all'età di 86 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Southworthが1454年にイギリスランカシュアイアサムレスブリーで生まれた時，父Sir Richard de Sotheworth Lord Samlesburyは44歳，母Elizabeth Molyneuxは30歳であった。彼女はSir William Houghtonとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1540年にイギリスランカシュアイアプレストンで86歳で死去した。

ko.St Leonards, Lancashire, England: 영국 랭카실르 월토-레-데일 스트 리나르드'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Southworth(이)가 1454년 영국 랭카실르 샘레스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard de Sotheworth Lord Samlesbury(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Molyneux(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 Sir William Houghton(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1540년 영국 랭카실르 프레스턴에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.St Leonards, Lancashire, England: ст леонард'с чурч, валтон-ле-деил, ланкашир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Southworth родилась в 1454 г. в местности сэмлесбури, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard de Sotheworth Lord Samlesbury было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Molyneux, 30. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Sir William Houghton. Она умерла в 1540 г. в местности престон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 86 лет.
